title: Check Health
description: Ensure the animal is healthy, active, and disease-free

title: Verify Weight
description: Animal must meet minimum weight requirements for Qurbani

title: Check Age
description: Cow: 2+ years, Goat: 1+ year, identify by teeth

title: Take Certificate
description: Get veterinary health certificate before purchase

title: Check Shelter
description: Ensure animal was raised in clean environment

title: Vaccination Record
description: Ask for vaccination history and medical records
